title: Japanese Style 2x2 Ad Banner Board AI
sourceTitle: Japanese Style 2x2 Ad Banner Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: four fictional lifestyle campaign quadrants: travel, learning, wellness, and work tools. Scene / Context: 2x2 equal grid with beach, cafe desk, morning run and clean product flat-lay scenes. Source Recipe Translation: Japanese-style 2x2 ad banner board. Preserve these source mechanics: clean Japanese digital advertisement banners, bright aspirational lifestyle photography, crisp hierarchy, modern campaign typography. Concrete social variant uses four fictional lifestyle campaign quadrants: travel, learning, wellness, and work tools in 2x2 equal grid with beach, cafe desk, morning run and clean product flat-lay scenes. Composition: vertical 4:5 social board with a clean 2x2 grid, large margins, and each quadrant readable as a thumbnail; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: clean Japanese digital advertisement banners, bright aspirational lifestyle photography, crisp hierarchy, modern campaign typography; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: This Year, Break Free / Start Here / Build More / Stay Light; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictional or generic subjects only, publication-safe, no real logo or unauthorized likeness; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: Japanese-style 2x2 ad banner board. Hero Subject: 2x2 grid of fictional Japanese-style digital ad banners for a quiet morning skincare campaign. Scene or Context: four equal quadrants with cream packaging, misty bathroom light, product close-up, lifestyle hand scene and minimal headline rhythm. Composition: square 1:1 board optimized for Pinterest save and X carousel preview, four balanced quadrants with consistent spacing; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: Japanese digital ad banner board, clean typography, soft commercial photography, restrained editorial graphic design; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: ASA / MORNING SKIN / SOFT RESET / DAILY CARE; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: fictional brand only, no real logos, no broken Japanese-like text, no random characters, no watermark, no clutter; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
